2603.21693.title: Deterministic Hallucination Detection in Medical VQA via Confidence-Evidence Bayesian Gain
2603.21693.paper_summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for medical Visual Question Answering (VQA), yet they remain prone to hallucinations, defined as generating responses that contradict the input image, posing serious risks in clinical settings. Current hallucination detection methods, such as Semantic Entropy (SE) and Vision-Amplified Semantic Entropy (VASE), require 10 to 20 stochastic generations per sample together with an external natural language inference model for semantic clustering, making them computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in practice. We observe that hallucinated responses exhibit a distinctive signature directly in the model's own log-probabilities: inconsistent token-level confidence and weak sensitivity to visual evidence. Based on this observation, we propose Confidence-Evidence Bayesian Gain (CEBaG), a deterministic hallucination detection method that requires no stochastic sampling, no external models, and no task-specific hyperparameters. CEBaG combines two complementary signals: token-level predictive variance, which captures inconsistent confidence across response tokens, and evidence magnitude, which measures how much the image shifts per-token predictions relative to text-only inference. Evaluated across four medical MLLMs and three VQA benchmarks (16 experimental settings), CEBaG achieves the highest AUC in 13 of 16 settings and improves over VASE by 8 AUC points on average, while being fully deterministic and self-contained. The code will be made available upon acceptance.
2603.21693.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在醫療視覺問答（VQA）中顯示出強大的潛力，然而它們仍然容易出現幻覺，這被定義為生成與輸入圖像矛盾的回應，這在臨床環境中帶來嚴重風險。目前的幻覺檢測方法，如語義熵（SE）和視覺增強語義熵（VASE），每個樣本需要10到20次隨機生成，並且需要一個外部自然語言推理模型進行語義聚類，這使得它們在計算上成本高昂且難以實際部署。我們觀察到，幻覺回應在模型自身的對數概率中顯示出獨特的特徵：不一致的標記級信心和對視覺證據的弱敏感性。基於這一觀察，我們提出了信心-證據貝葉斯增益（CEBaG），這是一種確定性的幻覺檢測方法，無需隨機抽樣、外部模型和特定任務的超參數。CEBaG結合了兩個互補信號：標記級預測方差，捕捉回應標記之間的不一致信心，以及證據大小，測量圖像如何相對於僅基於文本的推理每個標記的預測變化。經過對四個醫療MLLMs和三個VQA基準（16個實驗設置）的評估，CEBaG在16個設置中的13個中達到了最高的AUC，並且在平均上比VASE提高了8個AUC點，同時完全確定且自包含。代碼將在接受後提供。
2603.21693.author: Mohammad Asadi et.al.
2603.21693.authors: Mohammad Asadi, Tahoura Nedaee, Jack W. O'Sullivan, Euan Ashley, Ehsan Adeli
